recommendations.title: Orion and the Dark
recommendations.overview: A boy with an active imagination faces his fears on an unforgettable journey through the night with his new friend: a giant, smiling creature named Dark.

recommendations.title: Trollhunters: Rise of the Titans
recommendations.overview: The Guardians of Arcadia reunite to battle the nefarious Arcane Order, who've reawakened the primordial Titans.
recommendations.director: Johane Matte, Andrew L. Schmidt, Francisco Ruiz Velasco

recommendations.title: Mufasa: The Lion King
recommendations.overview: Mufasa, a cub lost and alone, meets a sympathetic lion named Taka, the heir to a royal bloodline. The chance meeting sets in motion an expansive journey of a group of misfits searching for their destiny.

recommendations.title: The Brave Little Toaster
recommendations.overview: A group of dated appliances, finding themselves stranded in a summer home that their family had just sold, decide to seek out their eight year old 'master'.

recommendations.title: Wind
recommendations.overview: Set in a world of magical realism, "Wind" sees a grandmother and her grandson trapped down an endless chasm, scavenging debris that surrounds them to realize their dream of escaping to a better life.

recommendations.title: The Snowman
recommendations.overview: A young boy makes a snowman one Christmas Eve, which comes to life at midnight and takes him on a magical adventure to the North Pole to meet Santa Claus.

recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.

recommendations.title: Lou
recommendations.overview: A Pixar short about a lost-and-found box and the unseen monster within.

recommendations.title: Doogal
recommendations.overview: An adorable candy-loving mutt goes on a mission to save the world.
recommendations.director: Jean Duval, Dave Borthwick, Frank Passingham

recommendations.title: Epic Tails
recommendations.overview: An adventurous mouse sets off to battle dangerous creatures in Ancient Greece, including Poseidon.
